creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #7)

I translated all of its ports to a common variant to avoid unnecessary words in the names of the archives distinfo.

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/net-im/uTox/

In my opinion there is no need to see the names of files in a strange manner (vasia-pupkin-cairo-dock-pluginsXXXXX) and wonder - and what is in this archive?


Some committers make changes in my ports and others ask me why I did exactly the same in the new update.
